prompt:
Yeap, that`s so difficult to study! But u can organise your day in a different way to have more free time. You can do some of your homework in a breaks between your other lessons. That will help u to have more free time in the evening. 

You actually dont have to do everything. You can ask ur groupmates to help u with some work. But u have to give them smth too.

Work hard all day long and then in the evening u will have some free time. U have to have a break! Otherway you will have problems with your mind and u will have to go to the specialist. 

Work hard and u will be the best student!

messages.content:
You are an expert English language examiner.
Evaluate the student's text based on the official CEFR scale.

## Scoring Rubric
- A1/A2 (Basic): Simple sentences, limited vocabulary. Errors are expected.
- B1/B2 (Independent): Can express complex ideas. Grammar errors are allowed if they don't block meaning.
- C1/C2 (Proficient): Flexible language use, wide vocabulary. Occasional minor slips are allowed.

## Critical Instructions
1. FOCUS ON VOCABULARY AND COMPLEXITY. Do not give a low score just because of a few grammar mistakes if the vocabulary is advanced.
2. A text with complex sentences and good idioms should be B2 or C1, even with some errors.
3. Do NOT default to A2. Look for reasons to give a HIGHER score.
4. Return result ONLY as a JSON object.
5. Optional context blocks may be present: CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, RANKING_ANCHORS.
   Use them as supporting evidence only. Do not copy labels blindly.
6. For each error object, cefr_threshold = the lowest CEFR level from which incorrect use of this element should be treated as an error in this methodology.

## 6) Output JSON (ONLY JSON)
Return ONLY this structure:

{
  "cefr_level": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2",
  "level_basis": {
    "rule_notes": "string"
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes|NC|No",
  "communicative_task_notes": ["string", "string"],
  "grammar_score": 0.0,
  "corrections": [
    "excerpt -> correction (Category; threshold; impact)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "...", "correction": "...", "comment": "...", "impact": "High|Medium|Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [],
    "Punctuation": [],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "...", "cefr_level": "A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2", "category": "Vocabulary|Grammar|Punctuation|Rhetorical feature|Discourse marker", "note": "..."}
  ],
  "feedback": "string (brief: level + key patterns + strengths + key rationale)",
  "next_steps": ["string", "string", "string"]
}

Do not output markdown. Do not output text outside JSON.

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT: Yeap, that`s so difficult to study! But u can organise your day in a different way to have more free time. You can do some of your homework in a breaks between your other lessons. That will help u to have more free time in the evening. 

You actually dont have to do everything. You can ask ur groupmates to help u with some work. But u have to give them smth too.

Work hard all day long and then in the evening u will have some free time. U have to have a break! Otherway you will have problems with your mind and u will have to go to the specialist. 

Work hard and u will be the best student!
TEXT_TYPE: essay
CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES: [{"ref_id":"sample_07010","cefr_level":"B1","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hey there! I've already finished the first semester, so I can help you. Here are some tips to have more free time:

	* Do tasks when they published, not at the last day. For example you thought that the homework will take one day, and after some time you realize that it is harder and you need to spend more time on it. But because you started earlier you have a lot of days before deadline, so you can do this homework easily.
	* Make plan and stick to it. You should know when you need to do certain homework, so you won't spend time on choosing task.
	* Don't forget to chill sometimes. You need to have at least one hour free time per day.
	* Sleep 7+ hours. If you think, that you can get more time by sleeping less -- you are wrong. You'll be exhausted the whole next day.

By following these tips I was able to pass all exams on score 8 or higher out of 10. Also, I had 1-2 hours free time each day and was able to participate in some olympiads/hackathons each weekends.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"they published,","labels":["Grammar"],"start":133,"end":148},{"text":"at the last day.","labels":["Grammar"],"start":153,"end":169},{"text":"For example you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":170,"end":185},{"text":"will","labels":["Grammar"],"start":212,"end":216},{"text":"realize","labels":["Grammar"],"start":255,"end":262},{"text":"is ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":271,"end":274},{"text":"need","labels":["Grammar"],"start":289,"end":293},{"text":"earlier you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":344,"end":355},{"text":"because","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":324,"end":331},{"text":"deadline","labels":["Grammar"],"start":382,"end":390},{"text":"plan","labels":["Grammar"],"start":436,"end":440},{"text":"homework, so","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":502,"end":514},{"text":"task","labels":["Grammar"],"start":548,"end":552},{"text":" think, that","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":669,"end":681},{"text":"-- you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":721,"end":727},{"text":"tips I ","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":799,"end":806},{"text":"on score ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":833,"end":842},{"text":"hours free","labels":["Grammar"],"start":881,"end":891},{"text":"weekends","labels":["Grammar"],"start":968,"end":976}],"strengths":[{"text":"For example ","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":170,"end":182},{"text":"Also","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":865,"end":869},{"text":"You should know ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":458,"end":474},{"text":"stick to it","labels":["Lexical choice ✓"],"start":445,"end":456}],"comments":[["since"]]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07020","cefr_level":"B2","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hey! I know that studying in university can be difficult, but don't worry, it will get better with time managment. Here are some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time:
Make a scedule and stick to it - plan out your day including study time, breaks and relaxion time. Prioritize your tasks - focus on the most important ones first. Use a planner or a calendar to keep track of your assigments and deadlines. Try to be effecient with your study time, find a quiet place to concentrate. Take breaks between study session to refreash your mind. Stay physically active - exercise is a great way to reduse stress and improve focus. Make time for hobbies and activities you enjoy to relax. Remember to take care about yourself: eat well, get sleep enough and don't forget to have some fun!
Hang in there and your life will be easier!","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":" in university","labels":["Grammar"],"start":25,"end":39},{"text":"managment","labels":["Spelling"],"start":104,"end":113},{"text":"scedule","labels":["Spelling"],"start":194,"end":201},{"text":"day including","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":234,"end":247},{"text":"breaks and ","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":260,"end":271},{"text":"relaxion time.","labels":["Spelling"],"start":271,"end":285},{"text":"assigments","labels":["Spelling"],"start":400,"end":410},{"text":"effecient","labels":["Spelling"],"start":436,"end":445},{"text":"session","labels":["Spelling"],"start":529,"end":536},{"text":"refreash","labels":["Spelling"],"start":540,"end":548},{"text":"reduse","labels":["Spelling"],"start":612,"end":618},{"text":"take care about ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":714,"end":730},{"text":"get sleep enough","labels":["Grammar"],"start":750,"end":766},{"text":" enough and","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":759,"end":770},{"text":"there and","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":810,"end":819}],"strengths":[{"text":" can be difficult","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":39,"end":56},{"text":"stick to it","labels":["Lexical choice ✓"],"start":206,"end":217},{"text":"refreash your mind. Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, im styduing in the MIPT - in one of the hardest technical universitiyes in Russia, and i want to give you some advices.

My first advidce - it to sleep from 7 to 9 hours (how much exactly depends from you) in day, and you should stand from up and go to bed in one time in day. With sleeping regulary in one time you will feel better and maybe you will feel better.

Next advice - it to make calendar with notions, or something like this, it helps to plan day wery succesfull. Sometimes procrastination wins you, but with notions it weel be easier to make hometasks in time.

The third advice - food delivery, if you have not enought time to cook something, or to go somewhere in big sity you can easily get food from delivery services. But sometimes people eats only food from delivery, and even don't go out from their rooms, of course it isn't good.

And the last what i want to say - probably your biggest troubles with time it that you have not hard character. Without this super ability it hard to self-controle, may be you should to ask your friends wathching what are you doing in free time, they can anounce if you spend time on games or other time-killers.

I believe that my advices can help to had more free time, good bye.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":5,"errors":[{"text":"im","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":4,"end":6},{"text":"styduing","labels":["Spelling"],"start":7,"end":15},{"text":"in the MIPT","labels":["Grammar"],"start":16,"end":27},{"text":" in","labels":["Grammar"],"start":29,"end":32},{"text":"i","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":91,"end":92},{"text":"some advices","labels":["Grammar"],"start":110,"end":122},{"text":"advidce","labels":["Grammar"],"start":134,"end":141},{"text":"advidce","labels":["Spelling"],"start":134,"end":141},{"text":"it to sleep","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":144,"end":155},{"text":"depends from","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":192,"end":204},{"text":"in day","labels":["Grammar"],"start":210,"end":216},{"text":"stand from up","labels":["Grammar"],"start":233,"end":246},{"text":"","labels":["Grammar","Lexical choice"],"start":261,"end":261},{"text":" in day.
